headline: From June
body: From June 15. Out of nowhere. Never in doubt. Sandro Tonali, Spurs. 🧘🏼‍♂️🇮🇹 Fabrizio Romano (FabrizioRomano) 🚨 EXCLUSIVE: Tottenham have entered the race to sign Sandro Tonali! 💣🇮🇹 De Zerbi wants Tonali as new star for the midfield, ideal to step up THFC level. Spurs ready to face Man City and Arsenal in the race for Tonali for new ambitious project to prove their intentions. —
raw_text:
From June 15. Out of nowhere. Never in doubt. Sandro Tonali, Spurs. 🧘🏼‍♂️🇮🇹


Fabrizio Romano (@FabrizioRomano)

🚨 EXCLUSIVE: Tottenham have entered the race to sign Sandro Tonali! 💣🇮🇹

De Zerbi wants Tonali as new star for the midfield, ideal to step up #THFC level.

Spurs ready to face Man City and Arsenal in the race for Tonali for new ambitious project to prove their intentions.





— https://nitter.net/FabrizioRomano/status/2066629554991427647#m
